metadata.description: Clean initial PGMR-lite ACE playbook for mistral_7b_instruct / nlp4re.

bullets.title: Use NLP4RE contribution pattern
bullets.content: Always connect the paper to the contribution with ?paper pgmr:has_contribution ?contribution . and type the contribution as pgmrc:nlp4re_contribution . Attach NLP4RE template fields to ?contribution or to properly bound nested nodes.
bullets.avoid: Do not attach NLP4RE template fields directly to ?paper except publication year.

bullets.title: Use full nested NLP4RE paths
bullets.content: For nested NLP4RE fields, first bind the parent node from ?contribution and then bind the requested child field. Examples: evaluation questions use contribution -> evaluation -> metric/baseline/validation; NLP task questions use contribution -> NLP task -> input/output/task type; dataset questions use contribution -> NLP dataset -> dataset field.
bullets.avoid: Do not skip parent nodes when asking for nested fields.
